Find the way to the old Starting Room

book.iskerside.accelerator_section:
In this contraption, XP orbs are accelerating to a non-collectable state!

It has been confirmed! (do not try to test)
book.iskerside.futher_instructions.title: Further Instructions
book.iskerside.futher_instructions.text_: Good! Now I can hack into the hatch system! I can't leave the hatches open, but can open them for a moment! When you're ready, simply say the voice command and this system here will trigger!
book.iskerside.guard_manual.author: Benzilla the Guard
book.iskerside.guard_manual.title: Manual for Prison Guards
book.iskerside.guard_manual.text_1: While you're guarding the prisoner, you'll only need one spell to leave the prison:
book.iskerside.guard_manual.text_2: Ollibragen schavtunli prison crobogdo teckranpeck exactly tpigiy sherlovash leave dgiorchiscatto screnneed now!
book.iskerside.librarian_information.tex: Ogrit rolpanchu truth recnek bolligrack villager digdyg sherpelk say chycagoli proiemdsh now!
2. Ask the librarian about his hidden stash!
book.iskerside.monsters_section:
Tureon Clance's innovative technologies weakened these monsters and made them peaceful!

 Now everyone can pet them safely!

*for details, check his book
book.iskerside.potions_section:
Our potions do not use magic at all!

Completely scientific production and effect applying!
book.iskerside.rules.title: Rules
book.iskerside.rules.singleplayer:
- Only for 1 player!

You can join the map in multiplayer, but only one can play, others will be spectating the main player.
book.iskerside.rules.nextpage: Read the rules on the next page!
book.iskerside.rules.main:
- Don't cheat/don't use mods!

- Don't throw away important items!

- Set render distance to 16 or lower!

- Put the book in the furnace to start the map!
book.iskerside.secret_info.title: Hidden Compendium Pages
book.iskerside.secret_info.text:
Some time ago I sent my colleagues the new edition of the Compendium of Scientists.
But news reached me that the book was torn apart! Obviously, ashamed, they've hidden the pages by now...
I would be glad if you could find them in your travel!
book.iskerside.secret_1.title: Kellic the Scientist
book.iskerside.secret_1.text:
Kellic the Scientist.

 He invented the aircraft that serves as the new science exhibition where the award ceremony will take place. It is made especially in the air to keep the shady scoundrels out. They can't afford to get there!
book.iskerside.secret_2.title: Loloken the Scientist
book.iskerside.secret_2.text:
Loloken the Scientist.

 He is the inventor of the new mobile flying vehicle - the Flyboat. His invention was sold for cheap at the sale, and now every swindler owns it.
book.iskerside.secret_3.title: Dilomore the Scientist
book.iskerside.secret_3.text:
Dilomore the Scientist.

 Always the first to arrive at all scientific events. Rumour has it that he uses a navigational teleporter that most scientists are only just begun to develop.
book.iskerside.secret_4.title: Eriot the Scientist
book.iskerside.secret_4.text:
Eriot the Scientist.

 A specialist who offers any scientific assistance to various scientists who may need it. For house calls, he uses his personally created truck, in which he carries his equipment.
book.iskerside.secret_5.title: Prisonerin the Scientist
book.iskerside.secret_5.text:
Prisonerin the Scientist.

 Leaves his laboratory only for the award ceremony, and the rest of the time sits inside. No one can remember what he ever did, but everyone is sure that he's working on something grand!
book.iskerside.secret_6.title: Mighty the Scientist
book.iskerside.secret_6.text:
Mighty the Scientist.

 Everyone was eagerly awaiting the results of his unique project, but suddenly the scientist disappeared. The search for him continues to this day, as does the search for his mysterious project...
book.iskerside.secret_7.title: Mear the Scientist
book.iskerside.secret_7.text:
Mear the Scientist.

 A newly accepted scientist who recently discovered a way to clone living beings. After trying this method on himself, he decided to register as 3 different scientists, but his deception was quickly revealed.
book.iskerside.secret_8.title: Iskrosolidius the Scientist
book.iskerside.secret_8.text:
Iskrosolidius the Scientist.

 The one who 'discovered' magic. This act made him pompous and arrogant, I can't stand him! As long as I'm the Lecturer, magic will be strictly regulated so that he could not exploit it!
book.iskerside.secret_9.title: Gorlock the Scientist
book.iskerside.secret_9.text:
Gorlock the Scientist.

 Found out that all his discoveries had already been made by someone before him. This is a unique case in science, so he holds an honourable position among us for that achievement.
book.iskerside.secret_10.title: Aheadyou the Scientist
book.iskerside.secret_10.text:
Aheadyou the Scientist.

 Famous for being ahead of most scientists in their discoveries. If you, for example, start a new project, it is more likely that this scientist will finish it and publish the results ahead of you.
book.iskerside.secret_11.title: Riolmone the Scientist
book.iskerside.secret_11.text:
Riolmone the Scientist.

 Discovered that everything around us are made up of blocks. Now, all his research is aimed at the attempts to decompose a block into smaller elements.
book.iskerside.secret_12.title: Biolian the Scientist
book.iskerside.secret_12.text:
Biolian the Scientist.

 He is engaged in science in his spare time, and is quite successful in it. But his main occupation is playing in the orchestra, which has been travelling around the world for a long time.
book.iskerside.secret_13.title: Bolg the Scientist
book.iskerside.secret_13.text:
Bolg the Scientist.

 He is the inventor of the automatic bat. Its uniqueness is that it beats only those who try to understand the principle of its inner workings.
book.iskerside.secret_14.title: Noah the Scientist
book.iskerside.secret_14.text:
Noah the Scientist.

 Constantly organises some events for us. His old school methods are very confusing, no one has ever completed a single one of his 'quests' yet. How are we supposed to know where to go? What do we do?!
book.iskerside.secret_15.title: Scientist the Scientist
book.iskerside.secret_15.text:
Scientist the Scientist.

 Due to the fact that his actual name is Scientist, we title him that as a joke. However, he took it too seriously and began trying to do random research, but each one was so ridiculous and funny that we kept the title for him, ha-ha-ha!
book.iskerside.secret_16.title: Todig the Scientist
book.iskerside.secret_17.title: Mirostius the Scientist
book.iskerside.secret_17.text:
Mirostius the Scientist.

 He thought of how to get milk not only from cows, but also from other animals. In his free time from science, he sells the milk he's produced from squids at the market.
book.iskerside.secret_18.title: Metalius the Scientist
book.iskerside.secret_18.text:
Metalius the Scientist

 Used magnets to locate rare ores. When was accused of cheating, showed everyone that the magnets were fake - he was searching for minerals with his own mind!
book.iskerside.secret_19.title: Prone the Scientist
book.iskerside.secret_19.text:
Prone the Scientist.

 He was able to make the working alternatives to modern technology from paper. They work appropriately and perform absolutely identically to the classic counterparts.
book.iskerside.secret_20.title: Mirolite the Scientist
book.iskerside.secret_20.text:
Mirolite the Scientist.

 Is known for the invention of the non-extinguishable light source. He spends every night in an attempt to put it out, and because of that constantly does not get enough sleep.
book.iskerside.secret_21.title: Hohlik the Scientist
book.iskerside.secret_21.text:
Hohlik the Scientist.

 Engaged in the development of principles for the principles for the development of security cameras. Many people think his principles are too complicated, but he says they're perfectly secured from this.
book.iskerside.secret_22.title: Playard the Scientist
book.iskerside.secret_22.text:
Playard the Scientist.

 Invented the redstone repeater, but failed to patent it. After losing in court, now trademarks everything™ he comes up with.
book.iskerside.secret_23.title: Pertus the Scientist
book.iskerside.secret_23.text:
Pertus the Scientist.

 Built a safe that's 100% uncrackable, but put all the drafts in it and forgot the password. Since many skilled craftsmen failed hacking the safe, no one doubts the reliability of this invention.
book.iskerside.secret_24.title: Threadsball the Scientist
book.iskerside.secret_24.text:
Threadsball the Scientist.

 The first one asked about breeding special types of chickens. After a few years, he managed to create a chicken that could fly, and another one that could climb, but they teamed up and flyingly climbed into the sky.
book.iskerside.secret_25.title: Otlen the Scientist
book.iskerside.secret_25.text:
Otlen the Scientist.

 Created a machine that processes anything into garbage. Some believe that it isn't that remarkable, but when they were asked to build such a machine, they refused, which proves the opposite!
book.iskerside.secret_26.title: Krug the Scientist
book.iskerside.secret_26.text:
Krug the Scientist.

 Known for his tendency to give his inventions unusual shapes. Because of this, many of his projects lose their practicality, although they look great from the side!
book.iskerside.secret_27.title: Pishocker the Scientist
book.iskerside.secret_27.text:
Pishocker the Scientist.

 Discovered more than 100 uses for emeralds. We certainly appreciate his work very much, but still prefer to use it only as a currency.
book.iskerside.secret_28.title: Kuprin the Scientist
book.iskerside.secret_28.text:
Kuprin the Scientist.

 He conducts the most amazing (in our opinion) experiments on people. During his trials, his subjects dance and sing, although many of us think that it is because of the drinks they are given.
book.iskerside.spell_1.title: Dark Spells (Page 1)
book.iskerside.spell_1.text_1: Kribunka blongo hungry isserent bicago villager logrosh bittogera now lorcondri tirimiri disappear!
book.iskerside.spell_2.title: Dark Spells (Page 2)
book.iskerside.spell_2.text_1: Parola inneresta angry tulpullo negommi zombie ulpanea legranx now hobonbo wzinn summons!
book.iskerside.spell_3.title: Dark Spells (Page 3)
book.iskerside.spell_3.text_1: Kundo marydpo locked zipundo cralosha chest picuit grennaka now gurdy furty opens!
book.iskerside.spell_4.title: Dark Spells (Page 4)
book.iskerside.spell_4.text_1: Roldunt sheschegro purple kirtolge adgesation barrier smigro khorofitc now zulbu necratitty delete!
book.iskerside.tutorial.title: Book of Tutorial
book.iskerside.tutorial.text:
Your tutorial ends here!

Now you'll have to figure out stuff on your own!

Good luck!
cutscene.iskerside.one.talk_1: Here! Your tickets have finally arrived! It's time to depart to the exhibition!
cutscene.iskerside.one.talk_4: Oh no, I forgot your Identification!
cutscene.iskerside.two.talk_1: Finally, everyone is here! Welcome to our annual award ceremony!
cutscene.iskerside.two.talk_2: Before we begin, I advise you all not to listen to Nitron, who's fed up with his watermelons! I don't know how did he manage to get inside.
cutscene.iskerside.two.talk_3: Today we are going to award the one who has achieved the greatest success in science - the one who is an outstanding scientist!
cutscene.iskerside.two.talk_5: Hah, no! You're only here for the reason that we appointed you as a scientist because of your ridiculous name, heh-heh!
cutscene.iskerside.two.talk_6: The prize will be handed out to Mear the Scientist who invented the cloning method!
cutscene.iskerside.two.talk_7: It remains to figure out which out of the three will receive it!
cutscene.iskerside.two.talk_11: You cannot take it this way!
cutscene.iskerside.two.talk_13: Where is Mighty the Scientist? He would know what to do!
cutscene.iskerside.two.talk_14: Have you forgotten? I used him for cloning!
cutscene.iskerside.two.talk_16: He wouldn't help you to take the prize anyway!
cutscene.iskerside.two.talk_18: Nobody move! I demand my prize! I'm the one who discovered the magic, so I am getting that prize of yours!
cutscene.iskerside.two.talk_19: Aargh! Alright, alright!! Someone, b-bring the p-p-prize, I've opened the d-door to the left!!
cutscene.iskerside.seven.talk_1: Ah! You've already teleported! Well, what's in here?
cutscene.iskerside.seven.talk_2: There are a bunch of colossal furnaces here! But the main goal is to find Iskerside!
cutscene.iskerside.seven.talk_3: So this is where goes all the coal from the colony!
cutscene.iskerside.seven.talk_4: Hmm... Someone is walking over there! But it's not Iskerside!
cutscene.iskerside.seven.talk_5: Here, take my armour and weapons, just in case! Deal with them, we'll wait here for now!
cutscene.iskerside.eight.talk_1: I've got the Totem of Undying! You cannot destroy me!
cutscene.iskerside.eight.talk_2: We will help you now! The anvil incoming!
cutscene.iskerside.eleven: Eh, I can't sit in it...
cutscene.iskerside.eighteen.talk_1: Today we are here to celebrate the appointment of our new lecturer - %s! %s the Lecturer would like to say a few words to you!
cutscene.iskerside.eighteen.talk_3: As you already know, Iskerside was defeated a week ago by me and my assistants from another world: Sitio, Notwoncio, Professorio, Bankerio, Gamerio, Wealthio, Gorireo and Caretakerio!
cutscene.iskerside.eighteen.talk_4: I would also like to thank all the scientists who helped me escape from the colony!
cutscene.iskerside.eighteen.talk_5: And the rescue squad... To them too... thanks.
cutscene.iskerside.eighteen.talk_6: Do you know why Iskerside became evil?
cutscene.iskerside.eighteen.talk_7: He went mad. The ban on magic ruined all his plans.
cutscene.iskerside.eighteen.talk_8: Using magic, he developed interesting projects, but was expelled. Back then his name used to be Iskrosolidius, does anyone remember that?
cutscene.iskerside.eighteen.talk_9: With his career ruined, he turned all his inventions into evil and almost took over the world!
cutscene.iskerside.eighteen.talk_10: So, after some discussion, we made the right decision.
cutscene.iskerside.eighteen.talk_11: From now on, magic will be considered a scientific school!
cutscene.iskerside.eighteen.talk_12: All of you who secretly used magic and deceived everyone at the exhibition now get a place in the %s new magical department right here in the World Science building!
item.iskerside.challenge_scroll.descript: You will be dropped to King Magmacube
item.iskerside.code_hint: Hi, Iskerside! We stole your hint! E&B
item.iskerside.gates_open: Gate is open, take this cross in a circle!
item.iskerside.quest_sword.description_3: Put it on a shelf at home!
talk.iskerside.aheadyou: Hey, it's you! How's Iskerside business?
talk.iskerside.aheadyou.a1: Iskerside is going to do something with Basaltius the Lecturer! I need to warn him as quick as I can!
talk.iskerside.aheadyou.a2: Ah! There is Basaltius - in his gold ship! Be careful!
talk.iskerside.anpessy: Open the chat with %s and click on one of the response options to reply to me!
talk.iskerside.anpessy.a2: Great! Now break the glowstone to start the map! Here's something for you!
talk.iskerside.anpessy.b2: Watch the walkthrough for golem’s sake!
talk.iskerside.ardorchair: Hello! My pal and I started a dispute: will anyone be able to defeat King Magmacube that sleeps down that pit? You may try! If you succeed, then I will win!
talk.iskerside.ardorchair.1_a1: Quite dangerous! But why do I need to give you gold to have a go?
talk.iskerside.ardorchair.2_a1: But why it is I who must pay?!
talk.iskerside.ardorchair.2_a2: Er... um... well... That's the order!
talk.iskerside.ardorchair.victory: Okay, get out, I won the dispute! That counts!
talk.iskerside.arial_neptule: Hi! Try my totally non-magical potions from the vending machines! They're free!
talk.iskerside.arial_neptule.a2: Yes-yes! Absolutely scientific potions! Not a piece of magic, that's right!
talk.iskerside.arial_neptule.b1: Is that the Magic Potion Guide behind you?
talk.iskerside.arial_neptule.b2: Wait, what?! I thought I left it at home...
talk.iskerside.arial_neptule.b3: Hey, it's not here! Don't joke like that!
talk.iskerside.arial_neptule_potions: No-no-no! Don't take the potions away - try them here!
talk.iskerside.arrow_section.speaker: [Speaker]
talk.iskerside.arrow_section.start_1: Welcome to the automated arrow-block testing site!
talk.iskerside.arrow_section.start_2: The buttons on the wall let you choose the type of block to shoot. Try them all for the full experience!
talk.iskerside.arrow_section.start_3: Releasing a new bow and arrows. Enjoy, the testing will end in 30 seconds!
talk.iskerside.arrow_section.stop_1: Time's up! Sucking in the bow and arrows back...
talk.iskerside.arrow_section.stop_3: Thank you for testing our wonderful arrow-blocks! Come back anytime!
talk.iskerside.bankerio: Mmm, who are you? Are you from the money delivery? Brought something to our bank?
talk.iskerside.bankerio.1_a1: No, I'm here to free you all from Iskerside! Come with me to the tower, I need you on my team!
talk.iskerside.bankerio.1_a2: Mmm, yes, I'm ready to go, Iskerside don't like my bank!
talk.iskerside.bankerio.1_a3: But first I'll have to activate all the banking cells - without this the bank cannot function without me. However, the way to turn them on is confusing, I don't understand how to do it...
talk.iskerside.bankerio.2_a2: Mmm, nice! The banking cells are outside, the ones with the lamps!
talk.iskerside.bankerio.complete: Mmm, it works! Thanks, I'm coming with you!
talk.iskerside.basaltius_c1: Your place is row 2, seat 5 - I've placed a gray carpet there for you, now sit down!
talk.iskerside.basaltius_c3.1: What? You again! Didn't I tell you...
talk.iskerside.basaltius_c3.2: There is no time, Basaltius! You have to hide! Iskerside is going to use his... Umm... Authority swap thingy!
talk.iskerside.basaltius_c3.5: It worked! Basaltius has gone! Now the scientists will obey me!!
talk.iskerside.basaltius_c7: Argh?! How dare you interrupt Iskerside's experiment?!
talk.iskerside.basaltius_c7.cont1: Ah?! It's you! I remember stripped you of your scientist's title!!
talk.iskerside.basaltius_c7.1_a1: My title? But who are you?! You're not...
talk.iskerside.basaltius_c7.2_a1: It can't be!! Basaltius the Lecturer was killed by Iskerside!
talk.iskerside.basaltius_c7.2_a2: That had to be done so that I would rise again in the new form! Now I have no prejudice against magic! Now I can cast spells too!
talk.iskerside.basaltius_c7.2_a3: And now I need to finish this Iskerside's project, you shall not prevent me from doing this!!!
talk.iskerside.basard.drill: Stop the drill! There is someone there!
talk.iskerside.basard.drill_buttons: Hey, do not mess with my drill!
talk.iskerside.basard: Stop! Ah! You are known face to me - you are the scientist who was captured by Iskerside, even before the scientist colony was created!
talk.iskerside.basard.cont1: Managed to escape this time too, eh? You will help us save the others, and only then we'll let you leave. We were sent here to save all the scientists from imprisonment.
talk.iskerside.basard.cont2: Here is your ticket, which grants you the right to leave us later.
talk.iskerside.basard.a1: What's this ticket nonsense? Who came up with this weird system?
talk.iskerside.basard.a2: It was Fasa- Oh, I mean Basaltius, the Lecturer.
talk.iskerside.bastiol: Need a picklock? Only in exchange for cool stuff!
talk.iskerside.betta_noskul: Got any questions about my machine?
talk.iskerside.betta_noskul.a1: Are there any problems with this accelerator?
talk.iskerside.betta_noskul.a2: Well, there used to be a lot of lags, but now it works perfectly!
talk.iskerside.betta_noskul.b1: Why is the door locked? I want to collect some of these XP-orbs!
talk.iskerside.betta_noskul.b2: Hey, it's not safe! Before, it was possible to enter when the accelerator is off, but now the guy at the information stand locked it for good.
talk.iskerside.blastaka_killaka: Nobody is allowed to enter this tunnel! The evacuation will be carried out according to the schedule with all prisoners together.
talk.iskerside.blastaka_killaka.a1: But I am escaping from the colony, let me pass, I'm in hurry!
talk.iskerside.blastaka_killaka.b1: Why do I need a ticket to freedom?
talk.iskerside.blastaka_killaka.b2: If the person is not identified, we are ordered to kill!
talk.iskerside.blastaka_killaka.b3: Wait, not kill, just detain, as far as I remember. Right?
talk.iskerside.bonks: Hey, I'm an illusionist! Want to see a trick?
talk.iskerside.bonks.a2: Then give me something valuable of yours and close your eyes!
talk.iskerside.bonks.b1: Hey, you're just a shameless robber, get out of here while you can!
talk.iskerside.booka: Books? You want books? Only I don't have any. But don't worry, give me yours - get the new ones!
talk.iskerside.booka.a1: They mistook you for a scientist, right?
talk.iskerside.booka.b2: That Iskerside took them all. I think.
talk.iskerside.booka.c1: Hey, librarian! Where is your hidden stash?
talk.iskerside.booka.c2: It's in the chest I'm looking at. Here's my key!
talk.iskerside.booka.c3: Ah?! How did you make me say that?! Hey! Don't touch my stash!
talk.iskerside.caretakerio_1: A visitor! From another world! Come and see the rarest blocks in our museum!
talk.iskerside.caretakerio_1.a1: But in my world... Nevermind, I just need you in our squad to fight Iskerside!
talk.iskerside.caretakerio_1.a2: I'm sorry, but no. I need to be here to watch over these relics.
talk.iskerside.caretakerio_1.b1: But there are a lot of such 'rare' things on Endermarket!
talk.iskerside.caretakerio_1.b2: Their items are useless junk! What, for example, can be made from iron? Only a pointless hook!
talk.iskerside.caretakerio.grass: Wonderful grass!!! Why are you destroying it?!
talk.iskerside.caretakerio_2.a1: Now there is nothing to guard! I'll give it all back if you come with me!
talk.iskerside.chairardor: Good afternoon, I've started a dispute with my pal: will anyone defeat King Magmacube? If no one will, then I win!
talk.iskerside.chairardor.a1: Stupid idea. And why do I have to give you something for an attempt?
talk.iskerside.chairardor.a2: I'll return it when I win!
talk.iskerside.chairardor.b2: Why try? What if I suddenly win?
talk.iskerside.chairardor.won_already: Wait, you already won! Why did we push you down there again?
talk.iskerside.chinchiron.1_a1: Eh?! What have you given me?! It's not that cloak! Give me the normal one!
talk.iskerside.chinchiron.1_a2: Hrmf! Take this one and get out!
talk.iskerside.chinchiron.2_a1: How unscrupulous! Come on, get up here, I'll teach you something!!
talk.iskerside.diode: Greetings!.. Do you want to know about... the future?..
talk.iskerside.diode.a1: All right, what can you tell about my future?
talk.iskerside.diode.a3: A polar bear on a lead?..
talk.iskerside.diode.b1: What about my past? Are you able to see it too?
talk.iskerside.diode.b3: Your documents... I see them yesterday... Burning in your furnace?..
talk.iskerside.doul: It's you! You escaped from the tower, battled with the guard monsters, defeated Kentilla! I've heard all about your achievements! Therefore, while waiting for your arrival, I came up with an escape plan! However, it's only involving your escape, so you must help! Bring me a few things and I can hack the lower hatches control system!
talk.iskerside.driver: Sorry, I forgot to take your documents with us...
talk.iskerside.driver.a1: Don't worry, I'll come up with something. Can you please release my Flyboat?
talk.iskerside.driver.a2: Yes-yes, here we go... Be careful out there!
talk.iskerside.end_master: Who are you? Уou are not Iskerside!
talk.iskerside.end_master.1_a2: Iskerside had spoken about you. You were in his tower and either wanted to help him or...
talk.iskerside.end_master.1_a3: So... Are you working for Iskerside or against him?
talk.iskerside.end_master.2_b2: I have to serve Iskerside. Do you really think that you can interfere with his plans?
talk.iskerside.end_master.3_a1: Yes! And I will get out of this cage!
talk.iskerside.end_master.3_a2: Then I'd better let you out!
talk.iskerside.end_master.3_a3: Listen - Iskerside is mad! We have to serve him since he penetrated into our world, took away our protector dragon, and built his huge tower... I had to earn his trust and become the guard of this tower.
talk.iskerside.end_master.3_a4: Take these magic boots! Iskerside always wears them when he's here. You need all the help you can get!
talk.iskerside.end_master.3_a5: Here's the plan: there is a door in the tower basement that leads to some top secret project of Iskerside. We need to find the lever-key to it! It's hidden somewhere on our island...
talk.iskerside.end_master.3_a6: We also need to assemble a team. Find 8 of our best residents and convince them to join the cause! Hurry up, I'm counting on you!
talk.iskerside.end_master.3_b1: Okay, I'll help you and Iskerside once more... Let me tell you, you know, all the scientists' secrets...
talk.iskerside.end_team: Wow! A portal! Are we entering it? Is this the one that requires the 'Escape Key'?
talk.iskerside.entrance_guard: To enter, you must show me two of your tickets.
talk.iskerside.entrance_guard.a1: But I only have one ticket left... Isn't one enough?
talk.iskerside.entrance_guard.a2: The rules require you to have two tickets. No tickets - no entrance. I cannot let you in.
talk.iskerside.entrance_guard.b1: Emm... One of the tickets has been stolen by a stranger! Hurry, you might just catch him - he was right there, outside! Come!
talk.iskerside.entrance_guard.b2: I am obliged to stand and guard the door. I am not going to go anywhere.
talk.iskerside.entrance_guard.c1: Don't you recognize me? It's me — %s, a well known scientist who's clearly invited to the ceremony!
talk.iskerside.entrance_guard.c2: I am aware. But rules are rules. Enjoy the available area of the exhibition.
talk.iskerside.eassen_barovo: Be careful! There is lava instead of the floor! Do not step in! At least you listen!
talk.iskerside.eassen_barovo.a2: Heh! Also, we stole and hid useful Iskerside's things right here!
talk.iskerside.eucly: Why won't anyone want my dragon's breath bottles? Don't say they're useless!
talk.iskerside.fastrier.3: I've completed the mission! At last!
talk.iskerside.fista_paryist.a1: Yes, everything is going to explode! Save yourself!
talk.iskerside.food_master: Iskerside took everything from me... Help!
talk.iskerside.food_master.a1: Huh... Where did you come from?
talk.iskerside.food_master.a3: You must help us! The way to Enderworld is somewhere in the Iskerside's tower!
talk.iskerside.gamerio_1: Oh, hey! What a nice day to play Zombockey™!
talk.iskerside.gamerio_1.1_a1: Oh no-no-no, I've already played today! Come with me to the Iskerside's basement, I'm assembling a team to fight him!
talk.iskerside.gamerio_1.1_a2: But I want to play! No one has played with me for a long time!
talk.iskerside.gamerio_1.2_a2: Then find someone who would sit with me and play! Only then ask for something!
talk.iskerside.gamerio_2: How did he beat me?! I always win! I don't want to play any more!
talk.iskerside.gamerio_2.1_a1: Sitio's gone, what about you, Gamerio? You must come with me too!
talk.iskerside.gamerio_2.1_a2: If only it was as interesting as the game...
talk.iskerside.gamerio_2.2_a1: Well, imagine it is a game! Let's say you're playing an adventure map...
talk.iskerside.gamerio_2.2_a2: Oh, yes! Then I'll get my weapons! You can take it too! Now we are ready to go!
talk.iskerside.gamerio_2.2_a3: No! Stop! Every adventure map must have a book with the rules, I know that! Where is it?
talk.iskerside.gamerio_2.3_a1: Ah, the book... All right, I'll bring you the book.
talk.iskerside.gamerio_2.3_a2: I'll be waiting. Please place it on the lectern.
talk.iskerside.gamerio_3: Oh, good! Now I'm ready to go with you!
talk.iskerside.gamerio_3.a1: Aren't you going to read the rules?
talk.iskerside.gamerio_3.a2: Who needs those rules! I'll be waiting for you on the spot!
talk.iskerside.gloredorz: Go back to where you came from!! You cannot defeat me!!
talk.iskerside.gorireo_1.a1: Oh, are you okay there?! Let's go fighting Iskerside!
talk.iskerside.gorireo_2: What are you doing?! Aaaah! Give it to me! Take my key to the Storage, get the tools from there and free me!! Now!!
talk.iskerside.gorireo.complete: Arch! All right, let's move! I'll be waiting for you there!!
talk.iskerside.guidan_с1: I can exchange your weapons! By the way, I'm the best smith of the Flying Bandit Gang! Let's mess around this place!
talk.iskerside.guidan_с5: I'll exchange weapons. I'm the best master of the Drilling Rescue Squad!
talk.iskerside.guidan_с5.a1: Aren't you supposed to be a member of the Bandit Villains or something? You told me this at the science exhibition...
talk.iskerside.guidan_с5.a2: Quiet!! I'm a soldier, got it? Here you go.
talk.iskerside.half.a1: I don't need to right now. Do you know where Iskerside is? I'd like to have a few words with him!
talk.iskerside.half.a2: Huh? He's up there, on the top floor of the tower.
talk.iskerside.half.a3: It's tricky to get upstairs, you know! Even for me...
talk.iskerside.iskerside_c1.1_b1: Wait, are you that stranger that took my ticket?! Because of you, the guard didn't want to let me in here!
talk.iskerside.iskerside_c1.1_b2: Yes... That ticket didn't help me. So I had to go back to my tower and take the dragon ride!!
talk.iskerside.iskerside_c1.1_b3: Now answer! Where is the prize?!
talk.iskerside.iskerside_c1.2_a1: Hey, calm down! No more destruction! Please, Basaltius, give him the prize!
talk.iskerside.iskerside_c1.2_a2: No! That's not an option!! %s, you've received the emergency sword! Do not hesitate! Strike him down!!
talk.iskerside.iskerside_c1.3_a1: OK, Iskerside, prepare to be defeated!
talk.iskerside.iskerside_c1.3_b1: I'm done. Let me out of here!!
talk.iskerside.iskerside_c1.3_b2: I cannot open the door until the end of the award ceremony. Rules are rules.
talk.iskerside.iskerside_c1.3_c1: No. Let's not fight today. We could sort this out! Basaltius, no need to be so stubborn!
talk.iskerside.iskerside_c1.3_c2: How dare you call me that!!
talk.iskerside.iskerside_c1.3_c3: If you can't follow my orders... I believe you have no place among us!
talk.iskerside.iskerside_c1.3_c4: I... I am stripping you of the scientist title! Get out!!
talk.iskerside.iskerside_c1.4_a1: What is this, Basaltius, are you mad?!
talk.iskerside.iskerside_c1.4_a2: The only thing I can do...
talk.iskerside.iskerside_c1.4_a4: I may be able to resolve the conflict from his side...
talk.iskerside.iskerside_c1.4_a6: You're coming with me to my tower.
talk.iskerside.iskerside_c2: What?! Ah, it's you! Well, why didn't you leave after your pathetic escape? I don't need anything from you!
talk.iskerside.iskerside_c2.1_a1: I thought I could help you find the right way to solve your problems!! But you just put me in a prison...
talk.iskerside.iskerside_c2.1_a2: Hmm. All right, come in. Here's a book and a quill, write down all your suggestions. Then put the book in the hopper over there. I'll 'read it later', heh!
talk.iskerside.iskerside_c2.2_a1: Wait!.. What... What about that prize you're so eager to get? Why is it so special?
talk.iskerside.iskerside_c2.2_a2: Heh! I was the one who designed that prize and put the Celebral Crystal inside! Also invented by me, by the way.
talk.iskerside.iskerside_c2.2_a3: That crystal was intended for special effects at the award ceremony... However, it can do much more!
talk.iskerside.iskerside_c2.2_a4: After my unfortunate banishment, I figured out how to unlock its full potential! Now I am able to swap authorities with Basaltius!!
talk.iskerside.iskerside_c2.3_a1: Wait, you did steal that magical prize after all?!
talk.iskerside.iskerside_c2.3_a2: Ha-ha-ha!! While you were busy mumbling to me back at the exhibition, my summoned skeletons took it from Basaltius' storage!
talk.iskerside.iskerside_c2.3_a3: Okay, I'm bored by you. Let's have some fun!!
talk.iskerside.iskerside_c2.3_a4: Battle arena!! Let's see how well you can fight various monsters, ha-ha!
talk.iskerside.iskerside_c2.sent_to_pris: How did you... No!!! Then I'll send you to the broken prison!!! It doesn't have an exit pipe! There is no way out!!! Farewell, it is finally time for me to meet Basaltius and his 'fleet'!
talk.iskerside.iskerside_c7: So that's who's so noisy here! You got rid of Basaltius, but that will not help you!
talk.iskerside.iskerside_c7.1_a2: With magic you can do much more!
talk.iskerside.iskerside_c7.1_a3: Well, you have not come here for nothing! I will introduce you to my main project, which will help me to take over this whole world!
talk.iskerside.iskerside_c7.2_a2: I'll demonstate you!! I'll have to spend all my magical and redstone energy on that! That's why I use coal furnaces to power all my equipment!
talk.iskerside.iskerside_c7.2_a3: You cannot escape, so you will voluntarily activate it!! Press the lever!!!
talk.iskerside.iskerside_c7.damage.1: What?! Then I'll launch anvils on you!!
talk.iskerside.iskerside_c7.damage.2: Argh!!! Maybe TNT will calm you down!!
talk.iskerside.iskerside_c7.damage.3: No!!! You will not dodge from the fireworks!!
talk.iskerside.iskerside_c7.damage.4: How did you manage to destroy the legs?! You're doomed!
talk.iskerside.iskerside_c7.damage.7: Aaaah!!! But there are still fireballs...
talk.iskerside.jacksar: Ah! It's you! You are entrusted with the important mission - lead Fastrier the Soldier to the storage room of the colony!
talk.iskerside.jacksar.cont1: Bring me a block of coal as a sign that the mission was successful! This way you will earn our trust and gain access to the area behind me!
talk.iskerside.jacksar.a1: But I've fallen down the pipe, I can't climb back!
talk.iskerside.jacksar.a2: We studied the plans, and we know that there is a secret passage! Do not delay us! Nothing is more important than the importance of the mission!
talk.iskerside.kentilla.a1: When will you feed me? I want to eat!
talk.iskerside.kentilla.b2: I'm making healing potions. You know, I was injured by the previous prisoner.
talk.iskerside.kentilla.b3: I will not make that mistake again! Now I'm standing beyond your reach! He-he!
talk.iskerside.kentilla.c1: What kind of place is this?! It's not an ordinary prison, is it?
talk.iskerside.kentilla.c2: You are in a compressed prison in a tight world, Iskerside has got many of them.
talk.iskerside.kentilla.d1: What's that pipe over there? Is that the exit from this room?
talk.iskerside.kentilla.d2: Heh, no! It's just a device that supports the prison compression! I clean it occasionally from spiders that get in there...
talk.iskerside.kentilla.e1: Tell Iskerside to release me! I only want to help! Can you unlock the door, please?
talk.iskerside.kentilla.e2: Hmm... I do have a key. Let me think...
talk.iskerside.kentilla.dead: Kentilla is dead! You cannot reply!
talk.iskerside.krasnobill: I'm not a scientist, I'm a medical doctor! That wizard took me here by mistake because of the same coloured clothes.
talk.iskerside.krasnobill.a1: Is it difficult to be in the role of a scientist?
talk.iskerside.krasnobill.a2: Each day is harder than the last one...
talk.iskerside.krasnobill.b2: I need to press a lever twice a day.
talk.iskerside.kromok.a1: Hey, don't you recognize me? It's me, %s, a well known scientist!
talk.iskerside.kromok.a2: You scientists all look the same. Access denied.
talk.iskerside.lore_brick: I can't believe it! This is outrageous!
talk.iskerside.lore_brick.a2: The scientists now have banned the use of anvil - they say it can be used for magic purposes!
talk.iskerside.lore_brick.a3: How ridiculous!! What's next? Our beloved armour stands??
talk.iskerside.mear: You're feeling better at last! It's with sadness that I welcome you to Iskerside's colony. We are all prisoners here. But don't waste any time - you need to get out!
talk.iskerside.mear.a2: Oh... Iskerside force us to work in the coal mines, I've been mining for days! Now it's a day off, the others are now operating the railway to get that coal somewhere...
talk.iskerside.mear.b1: So you think there is a way to escape?
talk.iskerside.mear.b2: Yes! We know you escaped from the Iskerside's tower - escaping this colony should be an easy job for you! Some of us are already trying!
talk.iskerside.mear.b3: But be inconspicuous! Iskerside is watching us through the cameras!
talk.iskerside.merchant.2: Thank you! Until the next deal!
talk.iskerside.metalius: I know what you need. I'll make it if you bring the parts.
talk.iskerside.metalius.a1: How do you know what I need?
talk.iskerside.metalius.a2: These things are required to escape, so naturally you need them. Isn't that obvious?
talk.iskerside.nort_nitron: Nice to meet you, I'm Nort Tine Nitron, a watermelon researcher... Say, do you believe in ghosts?
talk.iskerside.nort_nitron.a1: Of course not! Are you that melon scientist everyone laughs at?
talk.iskerside.nort_nitron.a2: But you all don't understand... Melons are a menace...
talk.iskerside.notwoncio_1: What do you want from me?! It doesn't matter now anyway... You know, my house is so flat, I want planks for building! Fill up my hopper with them and I will fulfil any request you make!
talk.iskerside.notwoncio_2: Hooray! Now I can start building a new house! By the way, what did you want from me?
talk.iskerside.notwoncio_2.a1: Go with me and join the Against Iskerside squad! We are heading to his basement with the iron door!
talk.iskerside.perelmak: Got caught, huh? I'm here too, that was my 1001st escape attempt - now I'm imprisoned for a looong time.
talk.iskerside.perelmak.1_a1: What's happened? How did I get here?!
talk.iskerside.perelmak.1_a2: I guess your 'escape' was caught on camera! Eh-heh! So the magical trigger teleported you here!
talk.iskerside.perelmak.2_a1: How long am I going to stay here?
talk.iskerside.perelmak.2_a2: Not the 1001st attempt, so your release is almost now...
talk.iskerside.person_too_far: %s is too far away! Come closer to reply.
talk.iskerside.pick_wilsh.a1: No, thanks, I'll handle it without you!
talk.iskerside.pick_wilsh.a2: Hey, I'm Will Pilsh! Everyone knows me and trusts me!
talk.iskerside.pick_wilsh.a3: Heh-heh, come back when you change your mind.
talk.iskerside.playard: Oh, hey! What a nice day to play Zombockey™!
talk.iskerside.playard.a2: The goal in Zombockey™ of your zombies is to reach the villager in the house! My golems will try to stop them. Move the zombies or spawn more (if they've gone) using the buttons. Avoid my golems and get to the villager!
talk.iskerside.pooh: That's the problem! I've eaten a lot of watermelons, and now I can't climb back! You'll have to blow up the TNT I put here. Take the shovel and find the secret detonator on the floor below!
talk.iskerside.professorio: Aah! Another one from another world! Do not touch my experiment!
talk.iskerside.professorio.1_a1: I am not here to interrupt you, I just need to immediately recruit you into my team to fight Iskerside. Do you remember him? Let's go!
talk.iskerside.professorio.1_a2: Iskerside?! Bad guy! Okay, let's go. To the tower, right? But climbing up there is not that easy. What a coincidence that my experiment is related to teleportation!
talk.iskerside.professorio.1_a3: Bring me 8 end crystals and I can activate this command block! You can find the end crystals on the very edges of our island, be on the look out!
talk.iskerside.professorio.2_a1: But which command block exactly: the one in the centre of the room or the one above your head?
talk.iskerside.professorio.2_a2: That's a dialogue block, you fool!
talk.iskerside.professorio.2_b1: End crystals? Are they really needed?
talk.iskerside.professorio.2_b2: Well, they may come in handy, may not... Bring them anyway!
talk.iskerside.professorio.complete: At last! Now we all can go to the Iskerside's tower!
talk.iskerside.profid: Greetings! I'm standing here in a cool pose to be noticeable to you! Help me!
talk.iskerside.profid.1_a2: Drop this into the magical purple wall generator and I'll reward you!
talk.iskerside.profid.2_a3: By the way, look at those strange banners - they're probably here for a reason...
talk.iskerside.profid.computer: Why did you do that? Now I have to get inside the computer!
talk.iskerside.pumpkinheads: Our saviour has arrived! Here, we made it prepared!
talk.iskerside.pumpkinheads.a2: The hidden passages! We made them here and there for you to sneak around!
talk.iskerside.pumpkinheads.b1: What is this all about? Why are you here wearing these pumpkins?
talk.iskerside.pumpkinheads.b2: We found out that with pumpkin on our heads we are invisible to Iskerside's cameras! Now we have complete freedom in the colony!
talk.iskerside.pumpkinheads.b3: We would've given one to you, but ours are stuck, we can't take them off... You'll have to find another one yourself!
talk.iskerside.robbers: We did not steal the coal block!
talk.iskerside.sitio_1.b1: Hey, would you like to SIT in a very comfy chair and ... play with Gamerio? He invites!
talk.iskerside.sitio_2: I won! So exciting! I liked that confrontation of villagers and zombies! I want more!
talk.iskerside.sitio_2.a1: Do you want more CONFRONTATION? Let's go fight Iskerside! There is an iron door in the tower, we are heading there!
talk.iskerside.skip: Are you sure you want to skip the story and go to Chapter %s? You can't come back if you do this!
talk.iskerside.skip.a1_3: I just want to get there!
talk.iskerside.skip.a1_4: I only want to play Against Iskerside 2!
talk.iskerside.skip.a1_5: I just want to play the weird way!
talk.iskerside.skip.a1_6: That chapter is my favourite! I'd like to start there!
talk.iskerside.skip.a1_7: Let's get straight to the Iskerside battle!
talk.iskerside.stranger: Pssss! Help me, I don't have a ticket, but you scientists have two of them! Please give me a spare one! Nobody wants to give it, you are my only hope! I will give you the most valuable item to me! The ticket is now more important than it!
talk.iskerside.tireon: Hello! How can I help you?
talk.iskerside.tireon.a1: I am a scientist! Where should I go?
talk.iskerside.tireon.a2: Everyone is waiting for you in the conference room, show the tickets to golem to pass.
talk.iskerside.tireon.a3: But be aware - they don't serve any meal inside...
talk.iskerside.tireon.b1: Do you know why there are so many suspicious people?
talk.iskerside.tireon.b2: Well, Flyboats have become cheap, anyone can fly to here.
talk.iskerside.tireon.b3: Don't let them trick you - all my food has been stolen already!
talk.iskerside.tireon.c1: I don't have any Identification with me... Is that a problem?
talk.iskerside.tireon.c2: Oh, that's bad! The controller is very strict! 'No food allowed,' he told me...
talk.iskerside.tireon.c3: Someone tried to break into his box, but only managed to break a leg. Hmf, that'll be a lesson!
talk.iskerside.tureon_klance: Do you want to know why the monsters are non-hostile?
talk.iskerside.tureon_klance.a1: How did you achieve such an effect?
talk.iskerside.tureon_klance.b1: Are you sure that they won't harm me?
talk.iskerside.tureon_klance.ab2: Buy my book and find out!
talk.iskerside.vilg.a1: Or maybe it's you who needs something?
talk.iskerside.vilg.a2: What? If you have a rare dark oak, then give it to me. If not, then leave me alone.
talk.iskerside.vilg.b2: Can't you see it from the title above my head?
talk.iskerside.wealthio: Ahh! Do not try to kill me! If you do this, my expensive security system will lock you in here!
talk.iskerside.wealthio.a1: I don't think it even exists!
talk.iskerside.wealthio.a2: No-no, eh, it's true: there it is! And here! And there! Argh!
talk.iskerside.wealthio.b1: Don't be afraid - I'm here to invite you to join the Against Iskerside squad!
talk.iskerside.wealthio.b2: Ah! I'll join! But I need a special cloak for the journey.
talk.iskerside.wealthio.b3: Here's a diamond for you, buy the cloak from Chinchiron the Merchant at the Endermarket!
talk.iskerside.wealthio.complete: You got it! Well, I'm coming!
talk.iskerside.wood_master: Iskerside has destroyed the portal and now the wood delivery is cut off!
talk.iskerside.wood_master.a1: Can I help you repair it?
talk.iskerside.wood_master.a2: Wow, who are you? Hmm... All right! Bring me at least 50 obsidian and put it in the furnace!
talk.iskerside.wood_master.repaired: Great! In a moment, the wood portal will work once again!
text.iskerside.info.player_left_2:
!

To spectate, wait until this person returns!
text.iskerside.news1.title: SCIENTISTS BAN MAGIC!
text.iskerside.news1.text:
Recently, the scientists have officially stated that they do not allow the use of magic in scientific projects.
 The hostility towards magic began from the very beginning, when a former scientist named Iskrosolidius discovered magic and started experimenting with it.
 World Science organisation banished him, after that he rebuilt his laboratory into a dark tower and took a new name - Iskerside!
text.iskerside.news2.title: FLYBOAT FOR EVERYONE!
text.iskerside.news2.text:
Now it's possible!
 With the help of the brand-new invention of one of the scientists, almost anyone will be able not only to drive everywhere, but also to fly!
 Powered by some stuff, the Flyboat airships come at a much cheaper price than full-size sky vehicles.
 Small, fast and reliable!
 They are already on sale at a discount!
text.iskerside.news3.title: FLYING SCIENCE EXHIBITION!
text.iskerside.news3.text:
The time has come for the opening of the annual scientific exhibition, which this time will take place on the grand invention of our scientists - FSE!
 Visitors can expect to see several projects presented by novice scientists, and for adept scientists who have received special tickets, a closed award ceremony will be held for the best of them.
text.iskerside.news4.title: ISKERSIDE'S TAKEOVER!
text.iskerside.news4.text:
Scientists are prisoners now!
 For some reason, the well known sorcerer Iskerside has kidnapped most of the world's renowned scientists!
 While expecting a quick return home from the FSE, they found themselves in the sudden storm that destroyed their skyships and Flyboats! Iskerside, who had caused that chaos, gathered all the survivors and sent them to his tower trap.
text.iskerside.news5.title: COAL COLONY?
text.iskerside.news5.text:
Sources report of the concealed camp where scientists now mine coal for Iskerside...
 That newly built colony has appeared on the steps of Iskerside's distant tower, right in the middle of the snowy plains.
 Magical protective shields prevent anyone from entering or leaving, but a rescue party is looking for a solution.
text.iskerside.news6.title: TRAGIC DEMISE!
text.iskerside.news6.text:
We've received the sad news that one of the scientists did not make it through the events of the recent Iskerside's storm.
 %s the Scientist jumped out of the window at the site of the horror and apparently 'fell from a high place' a few minutes later.
 Fortunately, everyone else survived! But now are, obviously, captured.
text.iskerside.news7.title: ISKERSIDE DEFEATED!
text.iskerside.news7.text:
Terror no more!
 Iskerside the Sorcerer has been defeated at his own testing arena by the previously thought dead %s the Scientist!
 It's surprising how this newfound hero has been able to display so much wit and strength!
 Now that the threat of evil Iskerside has passed, scientists no longer need to live in fear!
 For now.
text.iskerside.news8.title: SCIENTISTS SAVED!
text.iskerside.news8.text:
Thanks to the Rescue Squad, all imprisoned scientists were successfully returned from the Iskerside's colony!
 Commander Basard personally handled out tickets to freedom to each former prisoner. The squad tnen used the previously dug tunnels to escort the rescued people many blocks away from that terrible place.
text.iskerside.news9.title: MAGIC REVOLUTION!
text.iskerside.news9.text:
A major announcement is going to be made at the World Science Convention!
 Iskerside's defeat gave the opportunity for the scientific community to rethink the magic handling rules.
 In addition, since Basaltius the Lecturer disappeared, there have been suggestions that a new lecturer needs to be appointed.
 That too will be revealed at the convention.
text.iskerside.site.intro: Click to copy the link to my website:
title.iskerside.chapter1.subtitle: Chapter 1. Science Exhibition
title.iskerside.chapter2.subtitle: Chapter 2. Iskerside's Tower
title.iskerside.chapter3.subtitle: Chapter 3. Flyship Frenzy
title.iskerside.chapter4.subtitle: Chapter 4. Escape from the Colony
title.iskerside.chapter5.subtitle: Chapter 5. The Rescue Squad
title.iskerside.chapter6.subtitle: Chapter 6. The Enderquest
title.iskerside.chapter7.subtitle: Chapter 7. The Final Battle!
title.iskerside.escape.subtitle: has failed
